Off Calendar Jan-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jessica Weinger; Bay Area Legal Aid; 510-250-5257; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant Terrance Hall.

Court reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR # 5229, peggytsujimoto@gmail.com, 415-828-1919.

No other appearances. Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF VALENCIA GARDENS HOUSING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT is DENIED. Plaintiff's requested relief and assertions that Defendant has breached the settlement agreement are premature.

Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR # 5229, peggytsujimoto@gmail.com, 415-828-1919. (D501)

Mercedes Gavin; 415-497-1493; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiff Valencia Gardens Housing Limited Partnership.

PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION TO ENTER JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION is continued to November 29, 2021 per the order of the presiding judge.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
